title: EOG Resources (EOG)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on EOG Resources using FY2025 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what EOG is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-sdqx6e4q>
A 4% FCF growth rate is a reasonable assumption for a mature E&P company like EOG. It balances their highly efficient "double premium" well strategy with the natural cyclicality and depletion of oil and gas reserves.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-sdqx6e4q>
A 4% FCF growth rate is a reasonable assumption for a mature E&P company like EOG. It balances their highly efficient "double premium" well strategy with the natural cyclicality and depletion of oil and gas reserves.

terminalGrowth.rationale:

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).

faq.question: Why use DCF instead of a P/E or EV/EBITDA multiple?
faq.answer: Westmount Research. "EOG Resources (EOG) Intrinsic Value: A DCF Analysis." westmountfundamentals.com, March 18, 2026.
